slides.hook: AI sales workflows without code — now patented
slides.body: SalesCloser secured a U.S. patent for its graph-based AI system. This technology enables building complex sales workflows without requiring any coding, streamlining business processes.
slides.visual_direction: Minimal, structured layout with black/white base and orange accent. Left-aligned text.
slides.source_topic_headline: Daily 'AI for Work' Pulse: 3rd of May
